calendar.matters:
Plaintiff Rosa Robinson'S Motion By Plaintiff For Assignment Order
Off Calendar Jul-26-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Jeffery Windham, Esq. 415-368-8301 Defendant in Pro Per.
No other Appearance.

RULING - A R G U E D. Defendant informs the Court he has informed the other side of his appearance and has tried to file an Exemption. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

Plaintiff Rosa Robinson's Motion For Assignment Order.

Taken Under Submission.***(as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript)

A Proposed order is submitted by email.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR#6185, tonyvaughn@yahoo.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)

***After the hearing, an Order granting motion for Assignment Order is filed. (see scanned order for details)***

Plaintiff Rosa Robinson'S Motion By Plaintiff For Assignment Order
Off Calendar Jul-05-2019 Continued To Jul-26-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
John F. Bradley, Jr., esq. (408-998-2000) for Plaintiff.
Jeffery Windham (415-368-8301) Defendant in propria persona.

The Court notes Defendant still has not filed any papers. Hearing is held re: Defendant's expenses and earnings (as fully reported in the reporter's transcript). The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

Plaintiff Rosa Robinson'S Motion For Assignment Order is continued to July 26, 2019 at 9:30 in dept 302, Law and Motion. Defendant to file exemption by July 12, 2019. Plaintiff to file reply by July 19, 2019.

Judge: Richard Ulmer, Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR#6185, tonyvaughn@yahoo.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)

Notice Of Motion And Motion By Plaintiff For Assignment Order
Off Calendar Jun-27-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Jeffery Windham (T: 415-368-8301, E: jeffimaglobal@yahoo.com) Defendant in propria persona.
No other appearances.

Discussed, not in compliance with tentative ruling rule. The Court modifies the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF ROSA ROBINSON's Motion By Plaintiff For Assignment Order is continued to July 5, 2019 at 9:30am, Law and Motion Department. Defendant is instructed to contact plaintiff's counsel.

Judge: Richard Ulmer, Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR#6185, tonyvaughn@yahoo.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)

***after the hearing: Plaintiff's Counsel, John Bradley, was notified by court clerk of the modified ruling/continuance date.

Motion To Set Aside Default Judgment
Off Calendar Dec-05-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
John F. Bradley, Jr., esq. (408-998-2000) for Plaintiff/opposing party Rosa Ann Robinson.
no other appearances.

Not argued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT JEFFERY WINDHAM's Motion To Set Aside Default Judgment is DENIED. Moving party failed to meet his burden on a motion to vacate default and/or default judgment. Prevailing party to submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Lynn O'Malley Taylor, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. (D501)
